arts.ttl: Harry Maguire gives Patrick Dorgu verdict after Manchester United red card vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Patrick Dorgu was sent-off on just his fourth appearance for Man United during Wednesday night's 3-2 win over Ipswich Town at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim credits two Manchester United coaches for win vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Man United secured their first Premier League win in a month against Ipswich Town thanks to three goals from set pieces.

arts.ttl: Michael Owen reveals Sir Alex Ferguson desperation after making Man Utd admission
arts.sum: More than a decade after leaving Manchester United, racing enthusiast Michael Owen is "desperate" to engineer a new working relationship with his ex-Old Trafford boss

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Marcus Rashford transfer ruled out as Erik ten Hag makes honest admission
arts.sum: As Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim prepares for Sunday's FA Cup match against Fulham, his predecessor Erik ten Hag has been speaking about his own time in charge

arts.ttl: Ten-man Man Utd beat Ipswich in five-goal thriller
arts.sum: Harry Maguire secured 10-man Manchester United a first Premier League win since January, edging Ipswich Town 3-2 at Old Trafford. After a shaky defensive showing in the first half, United looked well-drilled in the second, throwing bodies on the line to make continuous blocks to end a run of three Premier League games without a win.

arts.ttl: Not perfect or pretty but Man Utd stayed in control - Amorim
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim praises his side for staying in control after going down to 10 men to beat Ipswich Town 3-2 at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Amorim will speak to Man Utd's Garnacho about sub reaction
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim will speak to Alejandro Garnacho about his reaction to being substituted in the 3-2 win against Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana breaks silence after Manchester United mistakes vs Ipswich Town
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana is under fire again after making a couple of mistakes which led to goals against Ipswich Town

arts.ttl: Manchester United: Ruben Amorim planning talks with Alejandro Garnacho after reaction to substitution
arts.sum: Red Devils boss has also defended Patrick Dorgu after the January signing’s dismissal against Ipswich

arts.ttl: Man United legend Wayne Rooney opens up on being 'absolutely battered' by Sir Alex Ferguson as he reveals the worst 'hairdryer' treatment of his career
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has recalled when he and Sir Alex Ferguson came to blows in the dressing room, having clashed at Portsmouth during the 2009-10 campaign.
